name: Della Fattoria Downtown Café
tagline: Naturally leavened sourdough and from-scratch pastries in downtown Petaluma.
seoDescription: Della Fattoria Downtown Café — artisanal sourdough, pastries, and full breakfast & lunch in downtown Petaluma, CA.

hero.heading: The bread that built a reputation.
hero.subheading: Artisanal sourdough, fresh pastries, and a seasonal breakfast & lunch — served in a 150-year-old downtown building.

images.heroAlt: Della Fattoria Downtown Café in Petaluma, CA

about.heading: About Della Fattoria
body: Della Fattoria began when Kathleen and Ed Weber turned a personal passion for bread — born on the family ranch in Petaluma in the early 1990s — into a nationally acclaimed bakery.
Today the downtown café serves naturally leavened sourdough, from-scratch pastries, and a full breakfast and lunch menu out of a charming 150-year-old building on Petaluma Boulevard.

services.title: Artisanal sourdough breads
services.description: Naturally leavened loaves, hand-built and baked fresh — the breads that earned Della Fattoria its national reputation.

services.title: Fresh-baked pastries
services.description: A daily case of from-scratch pastries made with the same care as the bakery’s celebrated breads.

services.title: Breakfast
services.description: Full-service breakfast served Thursday through Sunday in the historic downtown café.

services.title: Lunch
services.description: A seasonal lunch menu built on local ingredients and house-baked bread.

items.a: You'll find us at 143 Petaluma Blvd N, Petaluma, CA 94952.
We proudly serve Petaluma, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at (707) 763-0161 — we're glad to help.

sections.heading: Get in touch with Della Fattoria Downtown Café
sections.text: Call (707) 763-0161 or send a message — we'll get right back to you.
